Pengar och relationer: https://rikatillsammans.se/ett-rikare-liv/pengar-och-relationer/
Emotionella sidan av pengar: https://rikatillsammans.se/ett-rikare-liv/emotionella-sidan-av-pengar/
Våra samtal om pengar är ju sjukt trista: https://rikatillsammans.se/avsnitt/vara-samtal-om-pengar-ar-ju-sjukt-trista/
Frågor att ställa sig och sin partner i slutet av året: https://rikatillsammans.se/avsnitt/fragor-att-stalla-sig-och-sin-partner-i-slutet-av-aret/

Stötta oss på Patreon:
https://www.patreon.com/join/rikatillsammans

https://rikatillsammans.se/forum/t/123617

Prenumerera på nyhetsbrevet:
https://rikatillsammans.se/nyhetsbrev

videos.title: What Does the Massive Offer Sheet to Leo Carlsson Mean For Cale Makar and the Avalanche?
videos.summary_source_text:
What Does the Massive Offer Sheet to Leo Carlsson Mean For Cale Makar and the Avalanche? Philadelphia Flyers shake up the NHL with a shocking $90 million offer sheet for Leo Carlsson, challenging the Anaheim Ducks’ future and sending shockwaves through the league. Will Anaheim match the record-breaking $18 million AAV, or accept four first-round picks and risk derailing their rebuild around Carlsson? Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down how this bold move could alter the landscape for restricted free agents and reshape the salary cap conversation, with potential ripple effects across the NHL.

Discussion zeroes in on the high-stakes implications for teams like the Colorado Avalanche, especially with Cale Makar’s upcoming contract talks looming. As player values surge and front offices rethink negotiation strategies, how will teams keep their stars and maintain cap flexibility? The hosts also touch on Devon Toews’ role and performance, adding another layer to the Avalanche’s offseason. Can the Ducks afford to lose their franchise center, or is Anaheim destined to take a massive gamble?

videos.title: Chris Gotterup shoots EPIC 62 for comeback win | Round 4 | John Deere Classic | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
Chris Gotterup shoots EPIC 62 for comeback win | Round 4 | John Deere Classic | 2026 In the final round of the 2026 John Deere Classic, Chris Gotterup shoots a 9-under 62 to win his third PGA TOUR title of the year by one shot. 

The PGA TOUR heads to TPC Deere Run this week, for the 2026 John Deere Classic. Jordan Spieth returns to the place where he won his first TOUR title in 2013, becoming the first teenager to win on TOUR since 1931. Last year’s winner Brian Campbell is looking to become the first back-to-back winner since Steve Stricker won three times in a row between 2009-2011. A selection of exciting young stars will also be teeing it up this week, including Blades Brown who will be looking to add to his impressive four top 20 finishes this season, including a third-place finish at the Puerto Rico Open and a second round 60 at the American Express in January that saw the 19-year-old finish T18. Additionally, the World No. 1 Amateur Jackson Koivun makes his debut after a decorated collegiate career at Auburn University. Emillio Grillo also returns to the John Deere Classic, hoping to go one better than 2025, which saw him lose out in an agonizing play-off.

videos.title: The Best NHL Players Stickhandle With Their Toes
videos.summary_source_text:
The Best NHL Players Stickhandle With Their Toes The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

👉  Drills, breakdowns, progressions, and full mechanics playbook (100's of videos) all available in Train 2.0+ here: https://app.train2point0.com/bundles/membership-plus

videos.title: Connor McDavid Rarely Uses The Forward Stride
videos.summary_source_text:
Connor McDavid Rarely Uses The Forward Stride Connor McDavid rarely accelerates with a forward stride.

Watch any of his zone entries. The moment the puck hits his blade, his feet go straight into crossunders. Not because it looks smooth, but because the physics favor it. Crossunders let you take more strides in less time, and every stride is another chance to put force into the ice. The forward stride spends half its time recovering. The crossunder never stops producing.

But the mechanic is only half of it. The other half is instinct. The top 1% don't decide to crossunder when they receive the puck, it's already happening. You can start building that today: every time the puck touches your blade, first thought is crossunder. Repeat it until you stop thinking it.

That rewiring only pays off if your crossunder technique is dialed in, and that's what we break down here.

Be honest: when you catch a pass with space in front of you, is your first move a stride or a crossunder?

videos.title: Now this is WHY Golf Brands Charging Too Much?
videos.summary_source_text:
Now this is WHY Golf Brands Charging Too Much? We bought the most expensive iron sets in the golf shop and put them head-to-head against Miura, Proto Concept, and Vega irons to find out if the premium price tags are actually worth it. Using launch monitor data and real on-course testing, we compare distance, forgiveness, feel, dispersion, and overall performance to discover which luxury forged irons truly come out on top. 

If you're considering Miura, Proto Concept, Vega, or any high-end players irons, this test could save you thousands before your next golf club purchase.

videos.title: DO THIS TO YOUR FEET BEFORE BED...YOU'LL FALL ASLEEP FASTER | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
DO THIS TO YOUR FEET BEFORE BED...YOU'LL FALL ASLEEP FASTER | Dr. Mandell Did you know that one of the simplest ways to support better sleep may start with your feet? In this video, Dr. Alan Mandell explains the fascinating science behind warming your feet before bed and how this simple 2-minute habit may help you fall asleep faster by working with your body's natural sleep physiology. Learn how warming the feet promotes healthy blood flow, helps your body release heat from its core, and supports your circadian rhythm—the internal clock that prepares your brain for sleep. I'll also explain why wearing socks afterward may help maintain this effect and why cold feet can make it harder for some people to relax at night. This easy bedtime routine is inexpensive, takes only minutes, and may improve your overall sleep quality when practiced consistently. As always, if you have diabetes, neuropathy, or reduced sensation in your feet, use caution and avoid water that is too hot. videos.title: Why Autophagy Isn't One-Size Fits All
videos.summary_source_text:
Why Autophagy Isn't One-Size Fits All The timing of autophagy is not the same for everyone. Higher fasting insulin can mean the body needs more time fasting before deeper autophagy begins. Ketones are one way to track the transition, because their presence shows that the body is starting to access stored fat for fuel. This is why checking insulin and ketones can help people understand their own fasting response.

This is a clip from my conversation on The Primal Podcast. You can find the conversation on their channel or in the collaborations on my channel.

videos.title: Why Your Legs Get Heavy Mid-Shift (It's Not Your Cardio)
videos.summary_source_text:
Why Your Legs Get Heavy Mid-Shift (It's Not Your Cardio) Why Your Legs Get Heavy Mid-Shift (It's Not Your Cardio)

Most hockey players who feel their legs die mid-shift assume it's a cardio problem, so they go do more bike work, run more sprints, push their VO2 max higher, and then get right back on the ice and gas out again. The truth is that VO2 max and leg strength are only part of the equation. There's a completely separate variable that determines how efficiently your body uses that fitness, and if you're getting that variable wrong, no amount of cardio work will fix it.

In this video I tell the story of how my own UBC coach called me out for being out of shape when I was #1 on the beep test and top on the team in strength, which forced me to figure out what he actually saw that my fitness testing didn't measure. Watch the full breakdown to see why some players do less work but generate the same results on the ice, and the two specific things you can start working on to close that gap immediately.

👉 Drills, breakdowns, progressions, and full mechanics playbook (100's of videos) all available in Train 2.0+ here: https://app.train2point0.com/bundles/membership-plus

We give players and coaches a mechanical advantage by reverse-engineering elite NHL movements and making them available to players at every level.

A note for coaches and hockey parents: if your player is one of the fittest kids on their team and still gassing out late in shifts, please don't push them into more conditioning. That trap wastes years of development and can push players out of the sport entirely because they interpret it as a work ethic problem when it's really a mechanics problem. Mechanical leverage is trainable, but it's a different training input than conditioning is.

videos.title: GPT-6 Is Late. Here's What OpenAI Isn't Telling You
videos.summary_source_text:
GPT-6 Is Late. Here's What OpenAI Isn't Telling You Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/

On March 24, Sam Altman said GPT-6 was "a few weeks" away. That deadline came and went months ago — and most videos covering it are pure speculation with zero sources.

I spent weeks going through OpenAI's technical reports, Greg Brockman's interviews, and every credible leak on the model codenamed "Spud" to find out what's actually going on. This isn't about how smart GPT-6 will be — it's about why it's late, and what that delay reveals about OpenAI's real strategy.

Timestamps:
00:00:00 Introduction
00:01:02 Architecture & Scale — Why "Spud" Is Not an Incremental Update
00:02:47 The New Capabilities — Memory, Context & Reasoning
00:04:49 Benchmarks — Records Will Fall, But Read the Fine Print
00:06:13 Multimodal — Audio & Video Come Home
00:07:06 The Cost — What 100,000+ GPU-Days Actually Means
00:07:58 Safety, Alignment & the "Goblin Incident"
00:09:17 When Does GPT-6 Actually Launch?
00:10:23 The AGI Question

videos.title: Därför skulle jag ta Xiaomi YU7 i stället för nya Volvo EX60!
videos.summary_source_text:
Därför skulle jag ta Xiaomi YU7 i stället för nya Volvo EX60! Xiaomi är Kinas senaste och hetaste bilföretag – som har utmanat Tesla. 
Man började sälja bilar 2024 och siktar på 550 000 sålda bilar under 2026. Vilket ser ut att bli svårt eftersom den Kinesiska marknaden är brutalt konkurrensutsatt.
Än så länge förlorar man runt 4 000 dollar per såld bil … 
Märket ska komma till Europa 2027, men inget är känt om Sverigepremiär.

YU7 är märkets andra modell, en mellanklass-suv i samma storleksklass om Volvo EX60 – som inte ska säljas i Kina. Det finns massvis med varianter och tekniknivån är högsta möjliga.
Xiaomi är för övrigt ett företag som säljer all möjlig hemelektronik, men vågade göra det Appla inte vågade: starta biltillverkning.
Jag hyrde en Long range med bakhjulsdrift i Kina … och jämför den med EX60.
Volvon vinner på flera viktiga punkter, men det finns en sak som gör att jag skulle ta Xiaomi …

Se till att prenumerera så du inte missar något!

videos.title: Round 4 Highlights | 2026 BMW International Open
videos.summary_source_text:
Round 4 Highlights | 2026 BMW International Open The final day in Munich did not disappoint. With several players in contention throughout the day, the leaderboard continued to change before the tournament was decided on the final hole.

► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

The European Swing comes to a climax this week as the DP World Tour arrives in Germany. After five counting events in as many countries, the European Swing - the fourth and penultimate of the five Global Swings - draws to a close in Germany. Dan Brown will aim to do something never achieved before in the history of the BMW International Open: successfully defend the title. Last year, the Englishman won his second DP World Tour crown, carding a bogey-free final round of 66 as he fought off countryman Jordan Smith to win by two shots. Headlined by Race to Dubai leader Patrick Reed, a strong global array of talent has assembled as players representing 31 nationalities are set to feature. The American is joined by this season's fellow two-time DP World Tour winners Schaper, Casey Jarvis and Chacarra in teeing it up. Reed is one of four Major champions on show, joined by fellow Green Jacket winners Danny Willett and Sergio Garcia along with Martin Kaymer.

Welcome to the Official YouTube channel of the DP World Tour. Every week you can find extended tournament highlights and individual player highlights from the likes of Rory McIlroy, Justin Rose and Tommy Fleetwood. This is also the home of the 14 Club Challenge, Little Interviews, Fastest Hole and many more challenges, pranks and world record attempts featuring the biggest golfers in the world.

videos.title: I Spent £500 On The Internet's WEIRDEST Golf Equipment
videos.summary_source_text:
I Spent £500 On The Internet's WEIRDEST Golf Equipment Rick bought some of the internet's weirdest golf gadgets to find out if any of them can actually improve your game. From bizarre training aids to unusual inventions, it's time to separate the genuine game-changers from the complete gimmicks.


Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

videos.title: Create a Flat Spot Through Impact
videos.summary_source_text:
Create a Flat Spot Through Impact Click link in bio for lowest price on the Ball First Board. The best ball strikers aren't swinging like a pendulum — they're creating a flat spot through impact that keeps the club level with the ground.

This video breaks down the 3-step process to build that flat spot: bumping into your lead side before unwinding your shoulders, keeping the butt end of the club low over the ball, then rotating through to let it release up.

After this drill, your ground contact will get dramatically more consistent, eliminating those inconsistent chunks and thins for good.

We used the Ball First Board to train the correct weight shift and pressure into the lead side that makes this move possible.

Like this video if you're working on this, and check the link in my bio for the Ball First Board.

videos.title: Tiger’s Favorite Putting Drill  #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Tiger’s Favorite Putting Drill  #golfswing #golftips Tiger Woods used this simple drill to sharpen his strike and improve start line consistency on the greens. By placing two tees just wider than the putter head, you’re forced to return the face square through the ball with better control and accuracy. This also improves your ability to start the ball on line and control pace more reliably. A simple setup that delivers serious feedback on every stroke.

videos.title: The #1 Best Protocol to Reverse Gout (& Prevent It)
videos.summary_source_text:
The #1 Best Protocol to Reverse Gout (& Prevent It) Are you dealing with chronic gout attacks? Discover the underlying cause of gout, the foods that cause gout, and the best remedy for gout to help keep it from coming back.

0:00 Recurrent gout symptoms
0:11 Foods that cause gout
0:42 Underlying causes of gout
1:43 Fructose and gout flares
3:15 Hidden glucose and insulin
3:49 Gut health and gout
6:04 Gout attack on keto
7:02 How to lower uric acid
7:21 How to prevent gout 

🌟 Take the 2-minute Health Lever Quiz: https://drbrg.co/4vHltAh

Keep watching to explore the connection between insulin resistance, gut health, and gout: 
▶️ https://youtu.be/rCjjw8Fu8j4
▶️ https://youtu.be/F84ijY7Iofg
▶️ https://youtu.be/jZ4jNALF9Ys

Check out this article for 6 tips to reduce uric acid naturally: https://drbrg.co/4eQf3HX

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

When faced with a gout diagnosis, many people are told to reduce their intake of red meat, organ meats, and shellfish because they contain purines. Purines turn into uric acid, and for a small percentage of people, removing them from the diet may eliminate gout symptoms. However, many people find that avoiding purines alone doesn’t help.

Research has found that one of the strongest drivers of gout is insulin resistance. Uric acid is normally eliminated through the kidneys and the gut. When you have insulin resistance, it becomes more difficult for the kidneys to flush out uric acid. As uric acid builds up, it can accumulate in the joints, causing gout pain, or back up into the kidneys and contribute to kidney stones.

High-fructose corn syrup can significantly increase uric acid production in the liver. Fructose is found in table sugar, agave nectar, fruit, and fruit juice, and is primarily metabolized by the liver. Hidden glucose from industrial starches can significantly raise insulin levels, contributing to uric acid buildup and joint pain, especially in the big toe and knees. Poor gut health and alcohol consumption may also contribute to gout.

Some people experience a gout attack when starting keto, but this is typically temporary and often subsides within the first or second week. Consuming celery and increasing your fluid intake may help your body clear uric acid more quickly.

DATA: 
https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s00011-009-0031-9 
https://www.mdpi.com/1660-4601/20/4/3596 
https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC12276925/

videos.title: Seouls bästa burgare kostar bara 55kr?!
videos.summary_source_text:
Seouls bästa burgare kostar bara 55kr?! 📖 Köp vår bok: https://www.adlibris.com/sv/bok/burgare-sa-gor-du-varldens-basta-burgare-hemma-9789127191211

Vi är tillbaka i Sydkorea! Det har gått 10 långa år sedan vårt senaste besök, och det visade sig att de flesta av ställena vi provade förra gången inte längre fanns. Så det var dags att hitta nya ställen att tipsa er om. Men trots att Seouls snabbt växande burgarscen bjuder på många coola "over the top"-smashburgare som dryper av attityd, så var vi mest sugna på två ställen som tog hantverket på allvar och jobbade med ingredienser av riktigt hög kvalitet. Dessutom var de lika billiga som många snabbmatskedjor. De flesta burgarna kostade runt 70 kronor styck. Har de ko-rea eller?

Häng med på vår blixtvisit till Sydkoreas huvudstad, där vi faktiskt hittar en fullpoängare – och en av världens godaste patty melts!

videos.title: PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 3 | John Deere Classic | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 3 | John Deere Classic | 2026 Check out all the best shots from the third round of the 2026 John Deere Classic, featuring Rickie Fowler, Zach Johnson, Max Homa and Jordan Spieth, among others.

The PGA TOUR heads to TPC Deere Run this week, for the 2026 John Deere Classic. Jordan Spieth returns to the place where he won his first TOUR title in 2013, becoming the first teenager to win on TOUR since 1931. Last year’s winner Brian Campbell is looking to become the first back-to-back winner since Steve Stricker won three times in a row between 2009-2011. A selection of exciting young stars will also be teeing it up this week, including Blades Brown who will be looking to add to his impressive four top 20 finishes this season, including a third-place finish at the Puerto Rico Open and a second round 60 at the American Express in January that saw the 19-year-old finish T18. Additionally, the World No. 1 Amateur Jackson Koivun makes his debut after a decorated collegiate career at Auburn University. Emillio Grillo also returns to the John Deere Classic, hoping to go one better than 2025, which saw him lose out in an agonizing play-off.

SUBSCRIBE TO THE PGA TOUR: https://www.youtube.com/@UCKwGZZMrhNYKzucCtTPY2Nw 

Welcome to the official YouTube channel of the PGA TOUR. Here you can find everything you need to stay up to date with the world’s foremost golf tour. Check in for highlights from every tournament along with player profiles, exclusive series, swing analysis and all the greatest shots and amazing moments. Check out https://www.pgatour.com for complete coverage along with all the latest news, scoring, and stats! 
 
Follow the PGA TOUR:

TikTok - https://tiktok.com/@pgatour 
 
Watch exclusive broadcasts - https://www.pgatour.com/live 
PGA TOUR Superstore - http://www.pgatoursuperstore.com Check out all the best shots from the third round of the 2026 John Deere Classic, featuring Rickie Fowler, Zach Johnson, Max Homa and Jordan Spieth, among others.

The PGA TOUR heads to TPC Deere Run this week, for the 2026 John Deere Classic. Jordan Spieth returns to the place where he won his first TOUR title in 2013, becoming the first teenager to win on TOUR since 1931. Last year’s winner Brian Campbell is looking to become the first back-to-back winner since Steve Stricker won three times in a row between 2009-2011. A selection of exciting young stars will also be teeing it up this week, including Blades Brown who will be looking to add to his impressive four top 20 finishes this season, including a third-place finish at the Puerto Rico Open and a second round 60 at the American Express in January that saw the 19-year-old finish T18. Additionally, the World No. 1 Amateur Jackson Koivun makes his debut after a decorated collegiate career at Auburn University. Emillio Grillo also returns to the John Deere Classic, hoping to go one better than 2025, which saw him lose out in an agonizing play-off.

videos.title: China Just Dropped An Ultra-Bionic AI Human Replica Robot
videos.summary_source_text:
China Just Dropped An Ultra-Bionic AI Human Replica Robot China just revealed the U-World U1, a full-size ultra-bionic humanoid robot built for mass production. But the real story is not just movement, skin, or AI. It is the plan to make robots that can read emotions, remember people, and even recreate someone’s face and voice.

📩 Brand Deals & Partnerships: collabs@nouralabs.com
✉ General Inquiries: airevolutionofficial@gmail.com

📌 What You’ll See:
China reveals the U-World U1 humanoid robot
SOURCE: https://www.techradar.com/ai-platforms-assistants/ubtech-just-introduced-its-first-full-size-ultra-bionic-humanoid-robot-but-what-it-really-wants-to-do-is-make-robot-replicas-of-loved-ones-thats-a-hard-no
U1 pricing starts at 119,800 yuan with over 13,361 orders
SOURCE: https://global.chinadaily.com.cn/a/202607/01/WS6a44bceea310986e2b462f00.html
Customized robots may recreate faces and voices
SOURCE: https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/ubtech-launches-uworld-u1-the-worlds-first-full-size-mass-produced-ultra-bionic-humanoid-robot-302815272.html
Walker S2 robots are already entering real border checkpoints
SOURCE: https://interestingengineering.com/ai-robotics/china-ubtech-humanoid-robots-international-border

🚨 Why It Matters
This is bigger than one robot launch. Humanoids are moving from factories into homes, borders, elder care, emotional support, and even human replicas. That could change how people live with machines.

videos.title: 3ICE World Cup - Round Robin Games | July 4th
videos.summary_source_text:
3ICE World Cup - Round Robin Games | July 4th This two-day, eight-team international tournament in the Summer of 2026 brings together the best players from 8 hockey-loving nations to compete for the world championship at the home of the Belfast Giants: 3ICE USA, 3ICE CANADA, 3ICE GREAT BRITAIN, 3ICE SWEDEN, 3ICE FINLAND, 3ICE SWITZERLAND, 3ICE GERMANY and 3ICE AUSTRIA. The weekend brings games, fan activities and community events, an ice hockey celebration for locals and visitors alike.

2:18pm – Puck Drop Game 1 (3ICE USA v 3ICE Canada)
2:55pm – Puck Drop Game 2 (3ICE Sweden v 3ICE Finland)
3:45pm – Puck Drop Game 3 (3ICE Germany v 3ICE Austria)
4:20pm – Puck Drop Game 4 (3ICE GB v 3ICE Switzerland)

The O2 Belfast will host the inaugural 3ICE World Cup on Saturday 4 and Sunday 5 July 2026, bringing the most innovative global ice hockey to Northern Ireland for its debut year.

▶️ SUBSCRIBE: https://youtube.com/nhl

🔥MORE NHL VIDEOS: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PL1NbHSfosBuGoyOevGOoJ6nHPD7nDRVFn&si=MHZlxPpXKq2JlQx1

videos.title: Why poor posture limits rotation in the swing #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Why poor posture limits rotation in the swing #golfswing #golftips In golf posture, the body rotates on a tilted plane — not around a flat, level axis. When the upper body spins too early in transition, the swing plane changes and the club works across the ball, leading to over-the-top patterns and compensations. Allowing the lower body to lead helps you stay on plane and improves strike consistency.
If over-the-top swings or inconsistent contact are something you’re battling, head to the link in our bio. Our coaching plans give you clear guidance on sequencing and rotation so you can improve with structure and confidence.
Subscribe to Me and My Golf for more simple golf tips. In golf posture, the body rotates on a tilted plane — not around a flat, level axis. videos.title: The Biggest Supplement Mistake Most People Don’t Realize
videos.summary_source_text:
The Biggest Supplement Mistake Most People Don’t Realize The biggest supplement mistake is expecting vitamins to work while ignoring diet, and forgetting that nutrients don’t work alone.

🌟 Take the 2-minute Health Lever Quiz: https://drbrg.co/4fIlleT

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

Important nutrient cofactors:
• Vitamin D → K2, magnesium, zinc, B6, boron, vitamin A
• Zinc → copper
• B12 → folate
• B1 → magnesium
• Vitamin K2 → magnesium
• CoQ10 → vitamin E, selenium
• Vitamin A → zinc
• Vitamin E → selenium

Other supplement tips:
• Brazil nuts are one of the best food sources of selenium
• Calcium should be taken with vitamin K2
• Most calcium supplements contain calcium carbonate (limestone)

In nature, vitamins come in complexes. If you’re taking supplements without the nutrients that help them work, you may not get the results you’re expecting.

#supplements #vitamind #magnesium #zinc #vitamink2 #coq10 #b12 #selenium #calcium #nutrition

videos.title: Square the Club Face for Better Lag #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Square the Club Face for Better Lag #golfswing #golftips Many golfers struggle to hold lag and think it’s just a wrist or arm angle issue. The truth is that an open club face ruins lag before it even starts.
To retain lag effectively, square the club face, allow proper forearm rotation, and flex the wrist naturally while controlling the pivot. Proper sequencing of the body will naturally create lag — but you’ll only hit good shots if the face is presented correctly at impact.
Follow for more precise, practical coaching from Me and My Golf. Many golfers struggle to hold lag and think it’s just a wrist or arm angle issue. The truth is that an open club face ruins lag before it even starts.
To retain lag effectively, square the club face, allow proper forearm rotation, and flex the wrist naturally while controlling the pivot. Proper sequencing of the body will naturally create lag — but you’ll only hit good shots if the face is presented correctly at impact.

videos.title: WHAT HAPPENS WHEN YOU EAT A BANANA FIRST THING IN THE MORNING?  Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
WHAT HAPPENS WHEN YOU EAT A BANANA FIRST THING IN THE MORNING?  Dr. Mandell What really happens when you eat a banana first thing in the morning? The answer may surprise you. In this video, Dr. Alan Mandell explains how this simple, inexpensive fruit can help support your energy, digestion, gut health, brain function, heart health, muscles, and overall well-being. Learn how bananas provide natural carbohydrates for quick energy, soluble fiber to help keep you full, prebiotic fibers that nourish your healthy gut bacteria, resistant starch found in slightly green bananas, potassium for healthy muscles and blood pressure, and vitamin B6 to support your brain and nervous system. You'll also discover why bananas have been misunderstood because of their natural sugar and why they can be part of a healthy, balanced diet for most people. Small daily habits often lead to meaningful long-term health benefits, and this may be one of the easiest habits you can start today. If you enjoyed this video, please like, subscribe, and share it with someone who could benefit from this information.

videos.title: GPT-6 vs Grok 5: The Truth Behind the Hype (2026 Update)
videos.summary_source_text:
GPT-6 vs Grok 5: The Truth Behind the Hype (2026 Update) Everyone's making videos about Grok 5 vs GPT-6 like these models already exist — they don't. In this video, I go through xAI's official documentation, OpenAI's published specs, leaked internal roadmaps, and third-party benchmarks to separate what's actually confirmed from what's pure speculation.
Here's the uncomfortable truth: as of mid-2026, OpenAI has published nothing on GPT-6 — no system card, no specs, no timeline. Grok 5 is a different story, but not by as much as xAI's marketing wants you to believe. I break down exactly what's real, what's leaked, and what's just Elon Musk hype.

00:00 – Introduction
01:15 – What’s Officially Real (And What Isn’t)
03:16 – Architecture: Two Very Different Bets
05:02 – Capabilities: What the Benchmarks Actually Show
07:28 – Safety & Hallucinations: The Track Records
09:31 – Pricing & Speed: Where Grok Quietly Wins
11:35 – What This Means for You


This isn't a hype video. Every claim here is labeled as either confirmed, published, or leaked/rumored — so you know exactly what to trust before making any decision about which model to build your product, business, or workflow around.
If you're a developer: don't hardcode against one model. Build behind an abstraction layer.
If you're a business: the choice is about ecosystems, not just raw benchmarks.
If you're a creator: speed vs trust is the real trade-off right now.
Sources referenced: xAI's Frontier AI Framework, OpenAI's published system cards (GPT-5, GPT-5.6 preview), public benchmark results (AIME, SWE-bench, Humanity's Last Exam), publicly reported pricing pages, and verified leak reporting on Grok 5's architecture.
I'll update this analysis the moment either company publishes something official. Subscribe if you want the version of this story that separates receipts from rumors.
Which model are you actually planning to build on? Let me know in the comments — I read everything.

videos.title: Round 3 Highlights | 2026 BMW International Open
videos.summary_source_text:
Round 3 Highlights | 2026 BMW International Open With the wind picking up and the greens becoming increasingly fast, scoring proved far more difficult in round three as players battled challenging conditions at Golfclub München Eichenried. Despite the tougher test, the battle for the title remains wide open, with two players sharing the lead heading into the final round. 

► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

The European Swing comes to a climax this week as the DP World Tour arrives in Germany. After five counting events in as many countries, the European Swing - the fourth and penultimate of the five Global Swings - draws to a close in Germany. Dan Brown will aim to do something never achieved before in the history of the BMW International Open: successfully defend the title. Last year, the Englishman won his second DP World Tour crown, carding a bogey-free final round of 66 as he fought off countryman Jordan Smith to win by two shots. Headlined by Race to Dubai leader Patrick Reed, a strong global array of talent has assembled as players representing 31 nationalities are set to feature. The American is joined by this season's fellow two-time DP World Tour winners Schaper, Casey Jarvis and Chacarra in teeing it up. Reed is one of four Major champions on show, joined by fellow Green Jacket winners Danny Willett and Sergio Garcia along with Martin Kaymer.

Welcome to the Official YouTube channel of the DP World Tour. Every week you can find extended tournament highlights and individual player highlights from the likes of Rory McIlroy, Justin Rose and Tommy Fleetwood. This is also the home of the 14 Club Challenge, Little Interviews, Fastest Hole and many more challenges, pranks and world record attempts featuring the biggest golfers in the world. 

► WEBSITE: http://www.europeantour.com
► FACEBOOK: https://www.facebook.com/DPWorldTour

videos.title: Right Elbow Impact Position Drill – Blue Brick
videos.summary_source_text:
Right Elbow Impact Position Drill – Blue Brick Click link in bio for lowest price on the Blue Brick.

If you can't hit draws, it's your right elbow — not your swing plane.

This video breaks down why your right arm gets "over the top" in transition, killing your window at impact and causing pulls and slices. You'll learn exactly where tour players position their trail elbow at impact and the simple one-handed drill to feel it yourself.

After watching, you'll know how to create the biggest possible "window" between your elbows at impact, get the club coming from the inside, and start compressing the ball for real draws instead of slices.

We used the Blue Brick as visual feedback to confirm the club is swinging from the inside while you groove the elbow position.

Like this video if you're trying this drill, and check the link in my bio for the Blue Brick.

videos.summary_source_text:
This AI Golf Swing APP Is The Fastest Way I've Seen To Improve Your Swing Get instant feedback on every swing — try the Swing Coach app free for 2 weeks: https://www.dannymaude.com/Swing-coach-app

Ever wondered why you can hit balls for hours at the driving range and still not improve? It's rarely a lack of effort. It's a lack of feedback.

Most golfers are guessing. You feel like you've fixed your over-the-top move or stopped swaying off the ball… but without seeing what actually happened, feel and real are often two very different things.

That's why this caught my attention. Swing Coach is an AI golf swing analyser that gives you instant feedback as you're hitting balls — you don't even have to touch your phone. Just set it up, hit shots, and it tells you what's really happening after every swing, so you can stop wasting practice time on guesswork.

In this video you'll discover:

How the AI swing analysis works in a real practice session
How to set it up at the driving range in seconds
Exactly what it measures and how the feedback works
How it helps fix common swing faults like coming over the top
Why connecting "feel vs real" is the fastest way to improve your golf swing

I've tested a lot of golf training aids and swing apps over the years — this is one of the most effective ways we've seen to bridge the gap between what you feel and what's actually happening.

videos.title: How to Move Through Impact #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
How to Move Through Impact #golfswing #golftips If you struggle with weak contact or thin strikes, it’s often because your body isn’t shifting properly through impact.
This Forward Shift Drill helps you feel how the best players move — from the ground up — by rolling the ankles, shifting toward the target, and rotating the body through.
You’ll finish with your right shoulder over your left leg — the perfect impact position for solid compression.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. If you struggle with weak contact or thin strikes, it’s often because your body isn’t shifting properly through impact.

videos.title: The Blood Pressure Chart Everyone Should See
videos.summary_source_text:
The Blood Pressure Chart Everyone Should See Nearly half of all Americans have high blood pressure.

Discover more ways to support healthy blood pressure and protect your heart: 
▶️ https://youtu.be/BY3jgdsjKy8

🌟 Take the 2-minute Health Lever Quiz: https://drbrg.co/4g6kK77

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

Doctors are often hyper-focused on reducing sodium to lower blood pressure, and people are surprised to find their blood pressure does not go down after reducing their salt intake.

This is because reducing sodium won’t always correct the electrolyte imbalance that could be keeping your blood pressure high.

Research has shown that people with the highest sodium and lowest potassium ratio have the highest risk of heart attacks. The problem is the ratio, not necessarily sodium consumption. Most people in the US are consuming far more sodium than potassium.

Potassium helps to reduce blood pressure naturally by relaxing blood vessels, lowering adrenaline, protecting the inside of the arteries, and supporting insulin sensitivity.

If you suspect a potassium deficiency is contributing to elevated blood pressure levels in your body, address it before your high blood pressure becomes more severe.

videos.title: World’s Longest Golfer Uses Driver Every Hole! (Insane Round)
videos.summary_source_text:
World’s Longest Golfer Uses Driver Every Hole! (Insane Round) Want to improve your driving distance? Grab my FREE setup collection here: https://kyleberkshire.com/pages/setup-series-opt-in

Season 1, Episode 1 of Driver Everywhere is here, and I'm kicking things off at one of the most unique and iconic courses in the country, Tobacco Road Golf Club in Sanford, North Carolina.

The concept is simple. Driver off every tee I possibly can, attack every green I can reach, and find out exactly how much of an advantage my distance gives me on a golf course. No layups. No safe shots. Just pure aggression from the first tee to the last green.

Tobacco Road is the perfect place to start this series. It's one of the most visually stunning and brutally challenging tracks I've ever played, and I came here to take everything it would give me.

videos.title: New GT2 v EVERY Maserati: DRAG RACE
videos.summary_source_text:
New GT2 v EVERY Maserati: DRAG RACE We’re drag racing the performance versions of every model of Maserati over the quarter-mile, half mile, as well as comparing them in a brake test from 100mph.

Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-26-06

It’s time for an almighty Maserati head-to-head! 

We’ve got our hands on every performance version of every model of Maserati on sale in 2026, and we’re going to see how the four compare in a drag race! 

All four cars are equipped with the same 3-litre twin-turbo V6 engine, but which is likely to snatch the win? Let’s take a closer look at the stats… 

Starting with the SUV, the Grecale Trofeo, it produces 530hp and 620Nm, with this power sent to all four wheels. It’s the heaviest car here, at 2,027kg, and it costs around £106,000.

Alongside it we have the GranTurismo Trofeo. It’s slightly up on power compared to the Grecale, at 550hp and 650Nm, and it’s also equipped with four wheel drive. It tips the scales at 1,795kg, and it costs £151,000. 

Next up is Mat in the MCPura Cielo. In this instance the 3-litre V6 creates 630hp and 720Nm, but this power is sent to the rear wheels only! It weighs in at 1,560kg, and it costs £236,000. 

Finally we come to the road-legal track car, the GT2 Stradale. It puts down 640hp and 720Nm, with power once again sent to the rear wheels. It’s the lightest car here, at 1,465kg, and it’s also the most expensive, at £277,000! 

So will it be a simple race to the line between the MCPura and GT2? Or could the Grecale or GranTurismo spring a surprise? There’s only one way to find out for sure… LET’S RACE!

Ferrari v Lamborghini Drag Race: https://bit.ly/Carwow-Drag-Race-2606 We’re drag racing the performance versions of every model of Maserati over the quarter-mile, half mile, as well as comparing them in a brake test from 100mph.

All four cars are equipped with the same 3-litre twin-turbo V6 engine, but which is likely to snatch the win? Let’s take a closer look at the stats… 

Starting with the SUV, the Grecale Trofeo, it produces 530hp and 620Nm, with this power sent to all four wheels. It’s the heaviest car here, at 2,027kg, and it costs around £106,000.

Alongside it we have the GranTurismo Trofeo. It’s slightly up on power compared to the Grecale, at 550hp and 650Nm, and it’s also equipped with four wheel drive. It tips the scales at 1,795kg, and it costs £151,000. 

Next up is Mat in the MCPura Cielo. In this instance the 3-litre V6 creates 630hp and 720Nm, but this power is sent to the rear wheels only! It weighs in at 1,560kg, and it costs £236,000. 

Finally we come to the road-legal track car, the GT2 Stradale. It puts down 640hp and 720Nm, with power once again sent to the rear wheels. It’s the lightest car here, at 1,465kg, and it’s also the most expensive, at £277,000! 

So will it be a simple race to the line between the MCPura and GT2? Or could the Grecale or GranTurismo spring a surprise? There’s only one way to find out for sure… LET’S RACE!

Ferrari v Lamborghini Drag Race: https://bit.ly/Carwow-Drag-Race-2606
videos.summary: New GT2 v EVERY Maserati: DRAG RACE We’re drag racing the performance versions of every model of Maserati over the quarter-mile, half mile, as well as comparing them in a brake test from 100mph. Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: It’s time for an almighty Maserati head-to-head.

videos.title: 03.07.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
03.07.26 - RIFT Presentation RIFT is a modern trading platform that combines automated trading, manual trading, futures trading, and educational tools into one ecosystem.

Designed for both beginners and experienced traders, RIFT aims to simplify access to financial markets while providing users with tools that can help them participate more efficiently.

One of the key features of RIFT is its Auto Trading Engine, which allows users to allocate capital into automated trading strategies designed to operate without the need for constant monitoring. This enables participants to remain active in the markets without spending hours each day analyzing charts or placing trades manually.

For users who prefer direct market participation, RIFT also offers Manual Trading and Futures Trading functionality. This gives traders the flexibility to execute their own strategies, manage positions, and take advantage of market opportunities in real time.

RIFT is built around a non-custodial philosophy, meaning users maintain control of their own funds rather than depositing them into a centralized company account. This approach aligns with the growing demand for greater transparency, security, and user control within the digital asset industry.

Beyond trading, RIFT focuses heavily on education. Through training sessions, community support, and ongoing learning resources, users can develop a deeper understanding of trading, risk management, market psychology, and financial technology.

The platform also incorporates modern technologies such as AI-driven infrastructure, advanced execution systems, copy trading capabilities, and future integrations designed to create a more connected and intelligent trading environment.

Whether you are completely new to trading, looking for automated solutions, interested in futures markets, or seeking to expand your financial knowledge, RIFT aims to provide a complete ecosystem where users can learn, participate, and grow.

Key Features

• Auto Trading Engine
• Manual Trading
• Futures Trading
• Non-Custodial Infrastructure
• AI-Powered Trading Tools
• Copy Trading Features
• Educational Resources & Training
• Community Support
• Advanced Market Access
• Designed for Beginners and Experienced Traders

videos.title: Practice Your Takeaway Like This #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Practice Your Takeaway Like This #golfswing #golftips If your swing feels armsy and hard to get on plane, this drill will change that.
Instead of turning only your shoulders or lifting your arms, focus on moving from your chest to your belt buckle — using your ribcage to power the backswing.
This creates more space, helps slot the club naturally, and makes it easier to deliver the club consistently through impact.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. If your swing feels armsy and hard to get on plane, this drill will change that.

videos.title: Why Should You Pull To Stop In Hockey
videos.summary_source_text:
Why Should You Pull To Stop In Hockey The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 2 | John Deere Classic | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 2 | John Deere Classic | 2026 Check out all the best shots from the second round of the 2026 John Deere Classic, featuring Max Homa, Jordan Spieth, Zach Johnson and Tony Finau, among others.

The PGA TOUR heads to TPC Deere Run this week, for the 2026 John Deere Classic. Jordan Spieth returns to the place where he won his first TOUR title in 2013, becoming the first teenager to win on TOUR since 1931. Last year’s winner Brian Campbell is looking to become the first back-to-back winner since Steve Stricker won three times in a row between 2009-2011. A selection of exciting young stars will also be teeing it up this week, including Blades Brown who will be looking to add to his impressive four top 20 finishes this season, including a third-place finish at the Puerto Rico Open and a second round 60 at the American Express in January that saw the 19-year-old finish T18. Additionally, the World No. 1 Amateur Jackson Koivun makes his debut after a decorated collegiate career at Auburn University. Emillio Grillo also returns to the John Deere Classic, hoping to go one better than 2025, which saw him lose out in an agonizing play-off.

videos.title: The 2026 Takomo Fairway Woods Have been reviewed all WRONG...
videos.summary_source_text:
The 2026 Takomo Fairway Woods Have been reviewed all WRONG... Could this be the golf club that helps you become a single-handicap golfer?

In this video, I put the brand new Takomo fairway wood to the test to find out if it's one of the best fairway woods of 2026. With creators like Grant Horvat and the Bryan Bros now putting Takomo clubs in play, there's been a huge amount of hype around the brand. But does this fairway wood actually perform, or is it all just marketing?

I'll take you through the looks, feel, forgiveness, distance, launch, and whether this could be the perfect club for golfers looking to lower their handicap and hit more greens.

If you're considering a new fairway wood, thinking about Takomo golf clubs, or simply want to know if the hype is real, this is a review you won't want to miss.

videos.title: Dial In Your Bunker Strike  #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Dial In Your Bunker Strike  #golfswing #golftips his simple bunker drill helps you learn exactly where the club should enter the sand. Draw a line in the bunker, place the ball about a clubhead in front of it, and first practice striking the sand on the back edge of the line. Once you can consistently hit that entry point, add the ball and let the sand carry it out. This builds better contact, predictable distance, and far more confidence from the bunker.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. his simple bunker drill helps you learn exactly where the club should enter the sand. videos.title: THE ONE PART OF THE GRAPEFRUIT THAT HELPS YOUR HEART THE MOST | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
THE ONE PART OF THE GRAPEFRUIT THAT HELPS YOUR HEART THE MOST | Dr. Mandell Most people peel a grapefruit, enjoy the juicy fruit, and throw away the white pith without realizing it's one of the most nutrient-rich parts. In this video, Dr. Alan Mandell explains why the grapefruit pith deserves a place on your plate. Learn how its fiber, flavonoids like naringin and hesperidin, antioxidants, and other natural compounds support heart health, healthy cholesterol levels already within the normal range, blood vessel function, digestive health, gut bacteria, blood sugar balance, and overall wellness. Discover the fascinating physiology behind this often-overlooked part of the fruit, why its natural bitterness is actually a sign of beneficial plant compounds, and how one simple change can help you get more nutrition from every grapefruit. You'll also learn about important grapefruit medication interactions so you can enjoy this fruit safely. Small changes can lead to healthier habits, and this is one you won't want to miss.

*********************************

videos.title: Round 2 Highlights | 2026 BMW International Open
videos.summary_source_text:
Round 2 Highlights | 2026 BMW International Open An eagle-filled day at Golfclub München Eichenried saw the leaderboard tighten heading into the weekend, while home favourite Freddy Schott produced a box office finish to delight the Munich crowds and safely book his place for the final two rounds.

Making just as many headlines was Brad Dalke, whose impressive performance continued as the American not only made the cut on his DP World Tour debut but also heads into the weekend tied for fifth.

► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

The European Swing comes to a climax this week as the DP World Tour arrives in Germany. After five counting events in as many countries, the European Swing - the fourth and penultimate of the five Global Swings - draws to a close in Germany. Dan Brown will aim to do something never achieved before in the history of the BMW International Open: successfully defend the title. Last year, the Englishman won his second DP World Tour crown, carding a bogey-free final round of 66 as he fought off countryman Jordan Smith to win by two shots. Headlined by Race to Dubai leader Patrick Reed, a strong global array of talent has assembled as players representing 31 nationalities are set to feature. The American is joined by this season's fellow two-time DP World Tour winners Schaper, Casey Jarvis and Chacarra in teeing it up. Reed is one of four Major champions on show, joined by fellow Green Jacket winners Danny Willett and Sergio Garcia along with Martin Kaymer.

Welcome to the Official YouTube channel of the DP World Tour. Every week you can find extended tournament highlights and individual player highlights from the likes of Rory McIlroy, Justin Rose and Tommy Fleetwood. This is also the home of the 14 Club Challenge, Little Interviews, Fastest Hole and many more challenges, pranks and world record attempts featuring the biggest golfers in the world.

videos.title: Grok 5 Explained: AGI Breakthrough or Just a Bigger Model?
videos.summary_source_text:
Grok 5 Explained: AGI Breakthrough or Just a Bigger Model? Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Elon Musk says there's a 10% chance Grok 5 achieves something close to AGI — but the model hasn't even shipped yet. In this video, we separate what's actually confirmed about xAI's next flagship model from what's just Musk talking.

We break down Grok 5's rumored specs (6–10 trillion parameters, the Colossus 2 supercluster, over a million H100-equivalent GPUs), the full Grok timeline from 2023 to now, how Grok 3 and Grok 4 actually benchmark against GPT-4 and Claude, and why experts like Andrej Karpathy say AGI is still years away. We also cover the distillation controversy, the adoption problem (just 3 of 400+ federal AI projects), and the safety and regulatory questions nobody's asking.

⏱️ CHAPTERS
00:00 Intro
00:39 What Is Grok 5, Really?
01:54 The Timeline: From Grok 1 to Now
03:28 Under the Hood: Parameters, Data, Compute
05:13 What Grok 5 Claims It Can Do
06:53 The Benchmarks: How It Actually Stacks Up
08:30 What the Experts Are Saying
10:10 Where Grok 5 Could Actually Get Used
11:40 Safety, Alignment, and the Regulatory Gray Zone
12:59 Hype vs. Reality: The Real Verdict

videos.title: Stop the Reverse Figure Eight — Fix Your Swing Plane for Good
videos.summary_source_text:
Stop the Reverse Figure Eight — Fix Your Swing Plane for Good Click link in bio for lowest price on the Blue Brick.

Most golfers are swinging a reverse figure eight without realizing it — and it's the root cause of steep downswings, over-the-top moves, and those frustrating pull shots and pull fades.

In this video I show you the correct figure eight pattern: club head working outside on the backswing, shallowing from the inside, paired with the right weight shift from your back foot to your front foot. Once you feel this the correct way, you'll be able to shallow the club naturally, stop casting it over the top, and start hitting a tight, consistent draw instead of steep pulls.

I use the Blue Brick to take this feeling and get it completely neutral — it's the fastest way to see exactly what your club is doing on the way back and through, so you're not guessing.

golfswing #golftips #swingplane #golfdrills #fixyourslice #golfinstruction #golflessons #ballflight Click link in bio for lowest price on the Blue Brick.

The Moment I Realized I Figured Out My Driver Swing #shorts #golfswing  #golf #golfer #ericcogorno #shorts 

In this golf lesson, Eric Cogorno reveals the driver secret that helped him gain 50 yards: keeping the head back while shifting weight forward.

👕 Bobby Jones Apparel: https://bobbyjones.com/COGORNO

Code: COGORNO25 for 25% OFF
🎯 Precision Impact Right Wrist Trainer - https://pureswingproducts.com/?sca_ref=1815522.bXQUsGp2bS (Code: COGORNO for $20 OFF)
⛳ theHanger Training Aid - https://www.hangergolf.com/?sca_ref=944104.HqM9GYcX2I (Code: COGORNO for 15% OFF)

If you struggle with driver distance, weak fades, or hitting it too far right, this golf lesson explains the exact problem and the fix. Eric Cogorno breaks down the secret that helped him gain 50 yards off the tee in a single year: keeping the head and upper body behind the ball line while still getting the weight to the front foot. This golf swing key allows the club to deliver from low and inside, which is essential for any golfer who wants more driver distance and better contact. These golf drills also cover the natural arm rotation move that squares the club face and eliminates the weak slice that side bend alone won't fix. If you leave this video without trying the alignment stick drill, you're leaving driver distance on the table.

What You'll Learn:
• Why getting the upper body too far forward during the downswing kills driver distance
• How keeping the head behind the ball line allows the club to deliver from low and inside
• The side bend move that keeps the head back while the weight shifts forward
• Why extension, not forward bend, is key to maintaining head position
• The alignment stick drill for training proper head and weight position
• How to progress the drill from no backswing to half swings to full swings
• Why keeping the head back alone can still leave you with a weak slice
• The natural arm rotation move that squares the club face for more distance and less curve

videos.title: I Let Claude Fable 5 Test 143,000 Trading Strategies (HERE ARE THE BEST)
videos.summary_source_text:
I Let Claude Fable 5 Test 143,000 Trading Strategies (HERE ARE THE BEST) 🚀 **I Ran 142,537 Backtests Through Claude Fable 5… Here’s What Survived**

💬 COMMENT **"CLAUDE AI"** to get the free workbook, prompts, and strategy access.

Claude's Fable 5 just got unbanned.

I just ran 142,537 backtests through it, and 99.1% of them failed.

Having 140,000 open-source backtests sounds like an asset, but it actually creates a massive problem: a paradox of choice. Giving that many strategies to a human and asking them to find an edge is almost impossible.

So I delegated the job to Fable 5.

Not with theory.
Not with hype.
Not with fake screenshots.

We built an AI brain in Obsidian, mapped out the connections between indicators, and let Claude sift through the data. It used an over-fit detector, removed cherry-picked data, and filtered out strategies with low profit factors or bad Sharpe ratios.

We went from 140,000 strategies down to just 196 robust survivors.

I'm showing you all of it, plus exactly what indicators, timeframes, and pairs actually give you an edge in the market.

👉 Access all of my trading bots, Skills & MCPs: https://www.skool.com/daviddtech/about
🔥 FREE WORKBOOKS: https://app.strategyfactory.ai/resources/

---

## In this video you'll discover:

✅ How I ran 142,537 backtests using Claude Fable 5
✅ Why 99.1% of trading strategies actually fail
✅ How to build an "AI Brain" in Obsidian to map out indicator connections
✅ The exact filters Claude used to remove over-optimized and cherry-picked data
✅ Why the 1-hour timeframe and Crypto/Gold pairs performed the best
✅ The exact indicators that work best together (like Bollinger Bands + Volume)
✅ How AI trading is moving from "prompting" into real system-building

---

7:32 – Top Performing Strategies Revealed
8:19 – Why Finding an Edge is So Hard
8:45 – Free Workbook & Pine Script Access

---

⚠️ Quick note: everything here is for education, not financial advice. AI can help build strategies, test ideas, and automate workflows, but every system still needs proper backtesting, forward testing, and risk control.

videos.title: How much can a TOUR Caddie improve my score?
videos.summary_source_text:
How much can a TOUR Caddie improve my score? On the bag for the day is legendary caddie Billy Foster, who has looped for the likes of Seve Ballesteros, Darren Clarke and Lee Westwood, and helped Matt Fitzpatrick win the 2022 US Open. Billy caddied at Valderrama during the famous 1997 Ryder Cup and knows this course better than almost anyone alive. Can his decades of experience help me break par?

Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:
https://www.youtube.com/@LIVGolf

LIMITED EDITION MERCH (UK & US)
My new limited edition merch is now available — thanks so much for the incredible support!
UK viewers: https://uk.rickshiels.com
US viewers: https://us.rickshiels.com

MORE FROM ME
🎙 Podcast — The Rick Shiels Golf Show
https://www.youtube.com/@RickShielsGolfShow
🏌️‍♂️Golf equipment reviews — H.I.T Golf
Honest, independent testing of the latest drivers, irons, putters, golf balls and tech.
https://www.youtube.com/@HITGolfReviews

FOLLOW ME ⬇️
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/RickShielsPGA/
X: https://twitter.com/RickShielsPGA
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rickshielspga/
Website: http://www.rickshiels.com/

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. On the bag for the day is legendary caddie Billy Foster, who has looped for the likes of Seve Ballesteros, Darren Clarke and Lee Westwood, and helped Matt Fitzpatrick win the 2022 US Open. Billy caddied at Valderrama during the famous 1997 Ryder Cup and knows this course better than almost anyone alive. Can his decades of experience help me break par?

videos.title: Cancer is More Terrifying Than I Thought... Until I Found This
videos.summary_source_text:
Cancer is More Terrifying Than I Thought... Until I Found This Discover how cancer develops and spreads, the biggest factors that increase cancer risk, and natural strategies to help prevent cancer by supporting your immune system and overall health.

0:00 Cancer cells
2:54 How cancer develops 
4:36 Traditional cancer research vs. epigenetics 
5:59 More cancer facts
6:57 Prolonged fasting and cancer prevention 
7:17 Cancer and your immune system 
8:24 Cancer and vitamin D 
9:08 Inflammation and cancer 
9:28 Cancer and your DNA 
10:09 Factors that increase cancer risk
11:39 Cancer prevention tips

🌟 Take the 2-minute Health Lever Quiz: https://drbrg.co/3QWY1Qt

Discover more ways to support your body's natural defenses and overall health:
▶️ https://youtu.be/_N4_eodpFvs
▶️ https://youtu.be/a1fPSbFT7eU
▶️ https://youtu.be/daFxYFmUH-w

Take a deep dive into cancer prevention with this free guide: https://drbrg.co/3Rb1zyN

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

You already have cancer cells! Not active cancer, but precancerous cells. Even within a tumor, there can be many different types of cancer cells that survive on different types of fuel.

Most people don’t know these surprising facts about cancer. Cancer can send out “scouts” before it spreads, turn your own immune cells against you, and even steal energy from the immune system. Treatment may also fail to eliminate cancer stem cells, which is one reason cancer can sometimes come back.

Cancer develops in stages:
• Hyperplasia
• Atypical hyperplasia
• Metaplasia
• Dysplasia
• Carcinoma in situ
• Invasive cancer
• Metastatic cancer

Cancer cells grow as quickly as possible, consuming glucose and producing lactic acid. Prolonged fasting may help limit the resources cancer cells depend on.

The body has several natural lines of defense against cancer. Guardian cells help repair damaged cells or trigger self-destruction when cells can’t be repaired. Natural killer cells help target cancer cells. Immune function is heavily influenced by sleep, stress, and environment.

Cancer also has strategies to suppress the vitamin D receptor. Vitamin D is vital for healthy immune function and defense. Cancer cells need their own blood supply, and compounds like sulforaphane may help target this process.

Cancer thrives in areas of inflammation, which is why supporting a healthy immune system and overall health is so important.

Dr. Eric Berg, D.C. Bio:
Dr. Berg, age 61, is a chiropractor who specializes in Healthy Ketosis & Intermittent Fasting. He is the Director of Dr. Berg Nutritionals and author of the best-selling book The Healthy Keto Plan. He no longer practices, but focuses on health education through social media.

Dr. Berg is a licensed chiropractor in Virginia, California, and Louisiana, but he no longer practices chiropractic in any state and does not see patients, so he can focus on educating people as a full-time activity, yet he maintains an active license. 👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:

videos.title: STAYING PATIENT! Carolina Hurricanes Not Making Moves Just to Make Moves
videos.summary_source_text:
STAYING PATIENT! Carolina Hurricanes Not Making Moves Just to Make Moves After two days of not moves, it's clear that the Carolina Hurricanes are not making moves just to make moves. It's a smart play by the defending Stanley Cup champions, who have 98% of their roster coming back for the 2026-27 season. What does their roster situation look like? On the Friday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on why the Hurricanes being patient makes the most sense, especially with them having $11.105M left in cap space. If contracts right now seem high, there is no need to make a move just to say a move has been made. Plus, it seems they don't want to ruin roster chemistry. Secondly, what does the roster situation look like for the Hurricanes? With them having 98% of their Stanley Cup roster returning, does it make sense to force something? Finally, Zach concludes the show by going over the John Carlson situation of the defenseman going to Tampa for two years. While it did not fully work out, why is it not a big deal that Carlson isn't coming to Raleigh? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: 02.07.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
02.07.26 - RIFT Presentation RIFT is a modern trading platform that combines automated trading, manual trading, futures trading, and educational tools into one ecosystem.

Designed for both beginners and experienced traders, RIFT aims to simplify access to financial markets while providing users with tools that can help them participate more efficiently.

One of the key features of RIFT is its Auto Trading Engine, which allows users to allocate capital into automated trading strategies designed to operate without the need for constant monitoring. This enables participants to remain active in the markets without spending hours each day analyzing charts or placing trades manually.

For users who prefer direct market participation, RIFT also offers Manual Trading and Futures Trading functionality. This gives traders the flexibility to execute their own strategies, manage positions, and take advantage of market opportunities in real time.

RIFT is built around a non-custodial philosophy, meaning users maintain control of their own funds rather than depositing them into a centralized company account. This approach aligns with the growing demand for greater transparency, security, and user control within the digital asset industry.

Beyond trading, RIFT focuses heavily on education. Through training sessions, community support, and ongoing learning resources, users can develop a deeper understanding of trading, risk management, market psychology, and financial technology.

The platform also incorporates modern technologies such as AI-driven infrastructure, advanced execution systems, copy trading capabilities, and future integrations designed to create a more connected and intelligent trading environment.

Whether you are completely new to trading, looking for automated solutions, interested in futures markets, or seeking to expand your financial knowledge, RIFT aims to provide a complete ecosystem where users can learn, participate, and grow.

Key Features

• Auto Trading Engine
• Manual Trading
• Futures Trading
• Non-Custodial Infrastructure
• AI-Powered Trading Tools
• Copy Trading Features
• Educational Resources & Training
• Community Support
• Advanced Market Access
• Designed for Beginners and Experienced Traders

RIFT is built around a simple vision: making modern trading technology more accessible while helping users participate in financial markets through a combination of automation, education, and innovative infrastructure. videos.summary_source_text:
Have the Early Off-Season Moves Changed the Outlook of the Central Division? Central Division shake-up: Can the Chicago Blackhawks make a push up the Central Division as Utah Mammoth and Minnesota Wild make their own bold moves. Is the Colorado Avalanche’s grip on the division slipping?

Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down how the addition of Bowen Byram impacts Chicago’s roster, analyze Utah’s deepening center depth, and debate whether Minnesota’s savvy trade for Blake Coleman cements their playoff position. The hosts weigh Colorado Avalanche’s off-season adjustments and question if the Avalanche are truly still the team to beat in the Central. Plus, the show spotlights Alexander Ovechkin’s return to the Washington Capitals—could a storybook Stanley Cup run be in the cards? videos.title: How To Get Wedge Spin  #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
How To Get Wedge Spin  #golfswing #golftips To create real spin, you need the right mix of loft, speed, and strike. In this video we show why hitting low on the face — between grooves two and five — is where spin is created, not high on the club. By opening the face slightly and brushing the turf just before the ball, you give yourself a better chance to strike it with loft and friction. When you keep the shot low with the right contact, the ball will grab and check much faster.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. To create real spin, you need the right mix of loft, speed, and strike. By opening the face slightly and brushing the turf just before the ball, you give yourself a better chance to strike it with loft and friction. videos.title: The Fastest Way To Bring The Puck To Your Backhand
videos.summary_source_text:
The Fastest Way To Bring The Puck To Your Backhand The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.
